message:
test(oracle): add 16 conformance test suites covering affinity, joins, subqueries, edge cases

New test suites: where_affinity_coercion, order_by_mixed_types, group_by_expr_advanced,
nested_case, subquery_advanced, string_edge_cases, null_edge_cases, integer_edges,
distinct_types, compound_set_ops, left_join_advanced, coalesce_iif_edge,
insert_select_transform, delete_complex_where, multi_join, like_glob_patterns.

Total: 277 conformance oracle tests, all passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
